actions.leaf_title: Implement temperature conversion module with affine logic

revised.title: Implement temperature conversion with explicit affine formulas
revised.content:
The previous attempt used factor-based conversion; temperature is affine (y = a*x + b). Implement C/F/K conversions as explicit affine pairs, not via the existing factor table.

Files: unitconv/temperature.py, tests/test_temperature.py

Acceptance criteria:
- convert(0,'C','F') == 32.0 and convert(32,'F','C') == 0.0
- convert(-40,'C','F') == -40.0 (the fixed point)
- K conversions offset by 273.15 exactly

Test expectations: extend tests/test_temperature.py with the three anchor identities

actions.rationale: Failure shows the factor table was reused; the spec now names the affine formula and anchor identities.
